column8: Many of Mary Shelly's books were horror stories.
column9: Mary Shelley's mother died when Mary was a baby.
column10: Mary and Percy met for the first time in London.
column11: Mary finally became close friends with Percy's father.
column12: All the guests at Byron's villa created a ghost story.
column13: Mary Shelley was deeply affected by the deaths of her children.
column14: Percy Shelley's family offered Mary no money at all.
column15: There is some doubt about the cause of Mary's death.
